items.title: 1-on-1 with Kam Jones: On being traded after one year with the Pacers
items.body_excerpt: Kam Jones shooting a free throw for The Untouchables, captained by Gary McGhee. One week ago, Kam Jones was reminiscing about his draft night. The Marquette University product was taken 38th overall in the 2025 NBA Draft by the Pacers , who traded up with the San Antonio Spurs…

items.title: Ja to Portland, Duren Sign and Trades, Warriors Klutch Pipedream & More | Third Apron Podcast
items.body_excerpt: Ja Morant has been traded to the Trail Blazers for Jerami Grant and Kris Murray. We discuss that, Jalen Duren seeking a sign and trade, what the Pistons are trying to do, the Warriors trying to get LeBron and Anthony Davis, plus contracts for Andrew Wiggins, Julian Champagnie,…

items.title: Hornets 2030
items.body_excerpt: The Hornets traded away LaMelo Ball and Miles Bridges for players who didn’t start for their own teams last season, and picks. They won’t improve immediately. LaMelo has his issues, but on the court he destroyed opponents. An offensive juggernaut who led them to a fantastic…

items.title: The Blazers won the Ja-uction ... or did they?
items.body_excerpt: Portland stuns everyone by trading for Ja Morant. But why? Good morning. It's the end of June, and you know what that means: July is just around the corner. Let's basketball. Ja Morant is not Trae Young. That statement's not strictly a compliment or an insult. It's just a…

items.title: The Giants' Pride Firestorm Comes for the Press Box
items.body_excerpt: We are somehow on Day 18 of the San Francisco Giants Pride Hat controversy . We’ve reached the point where, according to my informed speculation, a beat writer has accidentally angered players with her public comments and is now engaged in damage control. I can relate to that…
